form.label: Claude Enterprise - Claude Code & MCP
form.description: Claude Code adoption and MCP/connector governance. Activity panels work from the Compliance API; analytics panels require the analytics_reports input.

search.query: `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" (event_type=mcp_* OR event_type=integration_* OR event_type=extension_*) | timechart count by event_type

`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:cost" product=claude_code | eval cost_usd=coalesce(total_cost_usd, tonumber(amount)/100) | stats sum(cost_usd) AS spend_usd | eval spend_usd=round(spend_usd,2)

panel.title: Claude Code Tool Accept vs Reject

search.query: `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_activity" | stats sum(claude_code_metrics.tool_accepted_count) AS accepted sum(claude_code_metrics.tool_rejected_count) AS rejected by email | eval reject_rate=if((accepted+rejected)>0, round(100*rejected/(accepted+rejected),1), 0) | sort - rejected | head 20

`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_activity" | stats sum(chat_metrics.connectors_used_count) AS chat_connectors sum(cowork_metrics.connectors_used_count) AS cowork_connectors by email | eval total_connectors=chat_connectors+cowork_connectors | where total_connectors > 0 | sort - total_connectors | head 20
